meta.title: AGI Pathways: Tomorrow's Futures
meta.description: Build your path to a better AI future. A hands-on sandbox where you assemble strategies, test scenarios, and create real-world action plans.

landing.title: AGI Pathways: Tomorrow's Futures
landing.tagline: Build your path. Explore scenarios. Assemble what matters.
landing.description: Snap together your strategy in a hands-on sandbox. Build defences, test real threat pathways, and create a blueprint you can use in the real world — for policy, education, or your community.
landing.howToTryItStep1: Click “Enter the sandbox” to open the game.
landing.howToTryItStep2: Start in Zone 1: build your week and tap the People / Planet / Parity blocks to set priorities. Use the sliders to fine-tune.
landing.howToTryItStep3: Jump to Zone 3: choose what to protect (e.g. schools, democracy), pick a threat pathway, then write and save your Threat Blueprint.
landing.howToTryItStep4: Move between zones with Previous / Next or the zone number tabs. Your progress is saved automatically.
landing.howItWorksBody: Five build zones: assemble your future, wire up AI drivers, snap together threat pathways, build your defence stack, and craft your action plan. Your progress is saved in your browser — no login.
landing.disclaimer: This is an independent capstone project by Joshua Williams for the BlueDot Impact AGI Strategy Course; it is not associated with BlueDot Impact or its staff.
landing.aboutBody: Ages 8+. Build a Threat Card, a Defence Map, and a Personal Action Plan you can actually use — in class, at work, or in your community.

game.title: AGI Pathways
game.howToPlayIntro: Use the zones to build your strategy. Progress is saved in your browser.
game.howToPlayZone1: Zone 1: Build your week and tap People / Planet / Parity blocks; use sliders to fine-tune.
game.howToPlayZone3: Zone 3: Choose an asset and a pathway, then write and save your Threat Blueprint.
game.howToPlayNav: Use Previous / Next or the zone tabs above to move between zones.

1.title: Build Your Future
1.intro: Snap together the pieces of a week you care about, then build the world's priorities (People, Planet, Parity).

2.title: Drivers of AI Progress
2.intro: Wire up how AI gets better: compute, algorithms, and data. See how timelines change.

3.title: Pathways to Harm
3.intro: Choose what to protect. Snap together a threat scenario and build your Threat Card — a real blueprint you can use.

4.title: Defence in Depth
4.intro: Build your defence stack: prevent, constrain, withstand. Assemble your strategy like a Trailmakers build.

5.title: Start Contributing
5.intro: Craft your intervention and a concrete 3–6 month step plus 1–3 year direction. Take it into the real world.

unit1.personalFuturePrompt: What does a good week look like? Drag in or type the building blocks (e.g. school, family, friends, hobbies).
unit1.societalSliders: Set how much the world should care about each. Move the sliders or tap the blocks below.
unit1.tapToAdjust: Tap block to boost; slider to fine-tune.

unit3.chooseAsset: What are you protecting? Pick your asset.
unit3.threatCardDescription: What could happen? (Use this in real discussions or policy work.)
unit3.assetBlocks: Choose one or more assets to protect
unit3.realWorldNote: This becomes a real-world artifact: use it in essays, presentations, or community discussions.
